title: sedum reflexum var. viride
intro: Sedum reflexum var. viride, also known as Green Dragon or Variegated Sedum, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia, and is prized for its unique green and white, variegated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Green Dragon include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures.
